mapper.sql: id, user_id, region, reason, status, reject_reason, audit_by, submitted_at, audited_at, effective_start_at, effective_end_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_expert_certification( user_id, region, reason, status, reject_reason, audit_by, submitted_at, audited_at, effective_start_at, effective_end_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{region}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{rejectReason}, #{auditBy}, #{submittedAt}, #{auditedAt}, #{effectiveStartAt}, #{effectiveEndAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_expert_certification SET reason = #{reason}, status = 1, reject_reason = '', audit_by = 0, submitted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, audited_at = NULL, effective_start_at = NULL, effective_end_at = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND region = #{region}

UPDATE user_expert_certification SET status = 2, reject_reason = '', audit_by = #{auditBy}, audited_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, effective_start_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, effective_end_at = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE user_expert_certification SET status = 3, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, audit_by = #{auditBy}, audited_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_expert_certification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND region = #{region} AND status = 2 AND (effective_start_at IS NULL OR effective_start_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (effective_end_at IS NULL OR effective_end_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM user_expert_certification WHERE region = #{region} AND status = 2 AND (effective_start_at IS NULL OR effective_start_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (effective_end_at IS NULL OR effective_end_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND user_id IN
#{userId}
